title: Set members and dictionary keys should be hashable
description: Enforces that set members and dictionary keys are hashable
message: Set members and dictionary keys should be hashable
recommendation: Use hashable objects for set members and dictionary keys
why_is_this_an_issue: Non-hashable objects can cause issues when used as set members or dictionary keys, as they cannot be used as keys in a hash table, which is essential for efficient data retrieval.
how_to_fix: Use hashable objects like integers, floats, strings, tuples, or use the frozenset or frozendict functions to make non-hashable objects hashable.

metadata.title: Set members and dictionary keys should be hashable
